item.title: Novartis CAR-T therapy Kymriah shows durable responses in new 5-year data
item.description: Novartis released long-term follow-up data on Kymriah showing durable complete responses in patients with diffuse large B-cell lymphoma. The CAR-T therapy continues to show sustained remissions at the 5-year mark.

item.title: Eli Lilly acquires obesity drug maker for $2.5B
item.description: Eli Lilly announced a $2.5 billion acquisition of a company developing next-generation GLP-1 receptor agonists for obesity treatment.

item.title: CRISPR Therapeutics advances exa-cel manufacturing with new GMP facility
item.description: CRISPR Therapeutics announced a new GMP manufacturing facility for exa-cel (exagamglogene autotemcel), its CRISPR-based gene therapy for sickle cell disease and beta-thalassemia.

item.title: bluebird bio gene therapy lovo-cel receives positive CHMP opinion
item.description: The EMA's CHMP has adopted a positive opinion recommending marketing authorization for bluebird bio's lovo-cel gene therapy for sickle cell disease in the EU.
